body:
daydreamingbambilesbian:

Its been extremely windy today… I plan to stay inside; I’m too scared to even try to go out with the winds howling like this…

I just wish I was snuggling close to a pretty girl, hiding my face against her while she tells me the weather will soon pass and I’m safe so long as I’m in her arms…
